title: Classical Conditioning Explained
script_summary: An engaging explanation of classical conditioning and its implications in psychology.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about classical conditioning.
It's a learning process where a neutral stimulus becomes associated with a meaningful one.
Think of Pavlov’s dogs—salivating at the sound of a bell.
This forms the basis of how we develop habits and emotional responses.
Understanding this can help us break unwanted habits or create positive ones.
Curious about how this applies to your life? Follow for more insights!
